title: MlDsaKey::level not validated before C call
description: MlDsaKey::generate and sign/verify pass level: u8 directly to the C shim as c_int. Valid values are 44, 65, 87. Any other value produces an opaque C error (WH_ERROR_BADARGS or wc_MlDsaKey_SetParams failure) with no indication in the error message that level was the problem. Users passing 2/3/4 (FIPS naming) instead of 44/65/87 will see mysterious failures. Fix: add explicit validation before the C call: if !matches!(level, 44 | 65 | 87) { return Err(...) } with a clear message naming the valid levels.
